// installCommand: Force pnpm even if Vercel auto-detects npm. The frontend was built with pnpm — using npm would re-resolve lockfile differently and may break.
// buildCommand: Run the same build Vite uses locally. Output goes to dist/.
// outputDirectory: Vite default — keep explicit so Vercel doesn't guess.
// framework: Vercel auto-detects but explicit removes the guess.
// rewrites: SPA fallback — any path that's not a static asset falls back to index.html so client-side hash routing keeps working on direct loads / shares.
// headers: Long-cache the immutable hashed assets (Vite outputs *.[hash].js), no-store the entry HTML so deploys take effect immediately.
